headline: Package zone still uncalibrated for rain-side dropoffs
detail: Deliveries can land too close to the exposed side during rain.
recommended_action: Tune the porch delivery rule before the next wet-weather shipment.

headline: Garage freezer remains above baseline
detail: Temperature variance is still within safe range, but it is warmer than the household norm.
recommended_action: Recheck seal and airflow during the next workshop pass.

headline: Package activity noted at front porch
detail: Package delivered near the rain-exposed edge of the porch.
recommended_action: Check the delivery zone and confirm whether the drop location is acceptable.

headline: Unusual motion noted at driveway
detail: Motion detected after quiet hours with no expected arrival noted.
recommended_action: Review the zone, timing, and whether this motion matches expected household activity.

headline: LEAK alert from garage freezer area
detail: Water pooling detected near the freezer line.
recommended_action: Stop water flow if known and safe, then check damage risk and containment.
